name: princi
description: Your personal context engine. Bootstrap any AI task by instantly warming up with relevant emails, Drive docs, Slack threads, and meeting decisions — before writing a single line of code.

interface.shortDescription: Search your email, Drive, Slack, and meetings from Codex
interface.longDescription: Princi searches your emails, Drive docs, Slack messages, and meeting notes so any Codex task starts grounded in the right background — instead of copy-pasting context by hand.
defaultPrompt: What tasks do I have from today's team sync meeting?
What did we decide about this in recent meetings?
